scope: The two workhorses; when each fits.
key_concepts: Standardization centers the data around zero with a standard deviation of one.
Min-max scaling compresses the data into a fixed boundary, typically between zero and one.
Standardization preserves relative outlier distances, while min-max restricts the space strictly.
Choice between them depends on the bounds assumed by the algorithm or the presence of activation functions (like neural networks).

definitions.definition: Transformasi nilai menjadi rata-rata nol dan deviasi baku satu.
Metode penyusutan sebaran nilai rentang fitur untuk merapat pada ukuran tetap, umumnya di antara angka nol hingga satu.

examples: Applying standardization to age data to make normally distributed traits comparable.
exclusions: Do not dive into robust scaling logic here (save for s03).
